summary: While the role offers the predictable schedule and work-life balance you prioritize, it is a poor fit due to the extreme mismatch between its cognitive demands and your professional strengths. The position requires mandatory complex financial modeling and high-level logical deduction, areas you find challenging, with errors carrying severe legal and financial consequences. Pursuing this role would likely lead to significant mental exhaustion and stress rather than the sustainable, wellbeing-focused career you are seeking.
